title: Bye Bi
lyrics: I will say that I feel better Just to hide that I feel better I will love myself forever And I see my blood run down You don't care if I miss you I pretend that I miss you But inside I'm dying to I'm dying to Give me love, I don't give it to you Don't know what if you don't want it Give me love, so don't be afraid Bye, bye Bye bye, motherfucker Hey, ever since I came into your life You saying that I'm a dark thing, it's not the truth It's just the way your voice does And what you say to yourself in the night Cause you're not cool with you And with that I gotta say, I do I do, motherfucker, I'm gone I'm sorry that you can't carry on With your inside your own mess Inside your own mind But I gotta go down the line I gotta find what's mine I can't do all this wasted time Sitting here thinking if you can't get your mind right I know it's mine, I know it's that way And you're just gonna have to learn the hard way But I'm sorry, bye bye for now See you, I'm about to call away, ay You don't care if I miss you I pretend that I miss you But inside I'm dying, dying, dying for you Give me love, but don't give me time Don't want love if you don't want it Give me love, so don't be afraid Bye, bye I know you're walking down the aisle With something that you really needed And I was like, fuck, I thought you just wanted convenience You wanna crude it, then tell me what I'm meaning So it doesn't matter if we went to a judge It doesn't matter if you had lots of people There were matters in your heart And see, there's a heart you didn't even wanna start It's like, why you gon' ink me in? Why you gon' ink me in? When you scribbled round the edges, my friend Why'd you try to ink me in? Why'd you try to ink me in? When you just scribbled away all the edges, woo-hoo You don't care if I miss you I pretend that I miss you But inside I'm dying, dying, dying for you Give me love, but don't give me time Don't want love if you don't want it And I, so don't be afraid Bye, bye
